title.v: bút toán phân bổ tự động

footer.v: 1 - Từ tk có sang tk nợ, 2 - Từ tk nợ sang tk có
footer.e: 1 - Cr.Account to Dr.Account, 2 - Dr.Account to Cr.Account

footer.v: 1 - Còn sử dụng, 0 - Không còn sử dụng

command.text: declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Số thứ tự %s đã khai báo trong các bút toán phân bổ tự động.' else N'The order number %s already exists.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Bút toán phân bổ hiện thời đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'This item has been modified or deleted by another user.' end select @$deleteConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Số thứ tự %s đã có phát sinh, không thể xóa được.' else N'Can not delete the order number %s. It has already been used.' end
select convert(varchar(19), datetime2, 121) as cookie from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec return

&ManagementObjectCheck;
if exists(select * from @@table where stt = @stt) begin select 'stt' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@stt)) as message return end declare @idNumber int select @idNumber = max(stt_rec) from dmpb select @idNumber = isnull(@idNumber, 0) + 1 select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID update @dmpb1 set stt_rec = @idNumber, tk_he_so = replace(rtrim(tk_he_so), ' ', '') + ';;', tk_du = replace(rtrim(tk_du), ' ', '') + ';;', cong_tru = '1;;'

&Calc;
delete dmpb1 where stt_rec = @stt_rec insert into dmpb1 select * from @dmpb1 update dmpb set pb_vv_yn = @job, pb_bp_yn = @department, pb_hd_yn = @contract where stt_rec = @idNumber select @idNumber as stt_rec return

#IF $dmpb1.NewValue <> $dmpb1.OldValue #THEN &ManagementObjectCheck; #END if not exists(select * from @@table where stt_rec = $stt_rec.OldValue) begin select 'stt' as field, @$recordHasBeenChanged as message return end if exists(select * from @@table where stt_rec <> @stt_rec and stt = @stt) begin select 'stt' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@stt)) as message return end #IF $dmpb1.NewValue <> $dmpb1.OldValue #THEN update @dmpb1 set stt_rec = @stt_rec, tk_he_so = replace(rtrim(tk_he_so),' ','') + ';;', tk_du = replace(rtrim(tk_du),' ','') + ';;', cong_tru = '1;;' #END

&Calc;
#IF $dmpb1.NewValue <> $dmpb1.OldValue #THEN delete dmpb1 where stt_rec = @stt_rec insert into dmpb1 select * from @dmpb1 #END update dmpb set pb_vv_yn = @job, pb_bp_yn = @department, pb_hd_yn = @contract, datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where stt_rec = @stt_rec

select stt_rec01 as stt_rec into #rec from dmpbn where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec01 <> '' insert into #rec select stt_rec02 from dmpbn where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec02 <> '' insert into #rec select stt_rec03 from dmpbn where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec03 <> '' insert into #rec select stt_rec04 from dmpbn where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec04 <> '' insert into #rec select stt_rec05 from dmpbn where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec05 <> '' insert into #rec select stt_rec06 from dmpbn where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec06 <> '' insert into #rec select stt_rec07 from dmpbn where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec07 <> '' insert into #rec select stt_rec08 from dmpbn where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec08 <> '' insert into #rec select stt_rec09 from dmpbn where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec09 <> '' insert into #rec select stt_rec10 from dmpbn where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec10 <> '' insert into #rec select stt_rec11 from dmpbn where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec11 <> '' insert into #rec select stt_rec12 from dmpbn where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec12 <> ''
if exists(select 1 from ct00 with(index(stt_rec)) where exists(select 1 from #rec where #rec.stt_rec = ct00.stt_rec)) begin select replace(@$deleteConflict, '%s', rtrim(stt)) as message from dmpb where stt_rec = @stt_rec return end
delete dmpb1 where stt_rec = @stt_rec delete dmpb where stt_rec = @stt_rec
var f = this, g = f.getItem('dmpb1')._controlBehavior; if (f._checked) g.setSequenceNumber('line_nbr');
